prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
Item "2. Properties" ENDS on this page; the next section is "Item 3. Legal Proceedings".
Locate the bottom edge of Item 2's text on the page.
- If the "Item 3" heading is visible on this page, then Item 2 ends on the line directly ABOVE that heading.
- Otherwise, Item 2 continues to the bottom of the page.
Then transcribe VERBATIM the LAST 5 lines of Item 2 immediately before it ends. These must be the FINAL lines right before the section ends, NOT lines from the top or middle of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
Item 2. Properties
We have leased principal properties in both Los Gatos, California, which is the location of our corporate headquarters, and in Los Angeles,
California. In addition, we own and lease various office and production space throughout the world.
We believe that our existing facilities are adequate to meet current requirements, and that suitable additional or substitute space will be
available as needed to accommodate any further physical expansion of operations and for any additional offices.
